film.title: Blood Ties
film.overview: Svend has sixteen children but his wife of 28 years, Gitte - the mother of the four youngest has had enough and wants a divorce. Nothing about this process is going to be simple as this family must reconcile an array of emotions, priorities and memories.

dialogues.dialogue: And I wasn't the end.  I didn't tell nobody that story before.  I guess I'm kind of ashamed of that.  And he always held it against me, too. He never said nothing,  but he always held it against me, I know he did.
but I guess it was my dad too... But I love you, son,  I... I love you  and I'm very proud.  I love you and I'm proud.  It's all right, Pop.
I... I love you  and I'm very proud.  I love you and I'm proud.  It's all right, Pop.  I can see it's hard to be a father.
